headline: Azure AI Foundry adds agent orchestration for multi-step enterprise workflows
summary: New Foundry Agent Service lets teams compose, evaluate, and govern multi-agent systems with built-in tracing and content safety.

headline: Copilot Studio opens autonomous agents to all Microsoft 365 tenants
summary: Autonomous agents can now trigger from events across Teams, Outlook, and SharePoint, with admin-level guardrails.

headline: Azure OpenAI Service expands fine-tuning to new reasoning models
summary: Enterprises can now fine-tune the latest o-series reasoning models with reinforcement fine-tuning in select regions.

headline: Gemini 2.5 Pro tops enterprise coding and long-context benchmarks
summary: Google's latest Gemini release posts state-of-the-art results on agentic coding and 2M-token retrieval tasks.

headline: Google Agentspace brings enterprise search and agents into one workspace
summary: Agentspace now unifies company knowledge, Gemini agents, and connectors across Drive, Confluence, and Jira.

headline: Vertex AI adds one-click model evaluation and grounding with Google Search
summary: New Vertex tooling lets teams benchmark candidate models and ground responses in live web results out of the box.

headline: Amazon Bedrock launches unified agent runtime with cross-model handoff
summary: Bedrock Agents can now route a single task across multiple foundation models, including Claude and Amazon Nova.

headline: Amazon Q Developer adds repo-wide autonomous refactoring
summary: Q Developer can now plan and execute multi-file refactors and upgrades across an entire codebase with review gates.

headline: SageMaker unifies notebooks, pipelines, and governance in one studio
summary: The next-gen SageMaker Studio consolidates data prep, training, and model governance for regulated industries.

headline: Claude Opus 4.8 sets new state-of-the-art on agentic coding evaluations
summary: Anthropic's flagship Opus 4.8 leads on SWE-bench-style tasks with a 1M-token context option for large repositories.

headline: Model Context Protocol becomes the de-facto standard for tool integration
summary: Major IDEs and cloud platforms ship native MCP support, letting agents connect to tools and data through one open protocol.

headline: Anthropic Academy launches free enterprise AI certification track
summary: A new structured learning path covers prompting, agents, and safe deployment, with an enterprise certificate coming soon.
